error_signature: ChartJS resets values to 0 on data update
title: ChartJS resets on dataset update
symptom: When updating the dataset in ChartJS, the chart resets its values to 0 before re-rendering. This disrupts the expected display of data.
not_this_if: Chart does not reset when data is updated
root_cause: ChartJS may not handle data updates smoothly, causing it to reset values to 0 before re-rendering. This behavior can be exacerbated by how the chart is rendered in WeWeb.
fix_steps: Create a variable named 'isRendered' in your component state.
Set 'isRendered' to false when updating the dataset.
Immediately set 'isRendered' back to true to force a re-render of the chart.
agent_instruction: Implement conditional rendering using the 'isRendered' variable to manage chart updates.
